question: Will Max Verstappen win 4 of the opening 10 races of the 2026 F1 Season?
reason: Verstappen has not won any of the first four races in the 2026 season.
evidence: Verstappen's best result is 5th place in the Miami Grand Prix.
Kimi Antonelli has won all four races so far.
Verstappen has accumulated 26 points, placing him 7th in the championship standings.
The next race is the Canadian Grand Prix on May 24, 2026.
The Belgian Grand Prix, the 10th race, is scheduled for July 17-19, 2026.
